subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down from Our presence unto them that have turned towards God and entered the Spot wherein the Divine Lote-Tree speaketh and the Spirit proclaimeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لمن توجه الی الله و دخل المقر الذی تنطق فیه السدره و ینادی الروح
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @nearness and remoteness, @station of the Manifestation of God
